introSection: Gold Digger is an L&T Systems wild mouse roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in 	Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. It was called Pakal from 1998 to 2015.
fullText:
Gold Digger is an L&T Systems wild mouse roller coaster located at Mirabilandia in 	Savio, Emilia-Romagna, Italy. It was called Pakal from 1998 to 2015.



Brown track and supports.
